title: drift < 1% 3일 지속 monitor
drift_metric_definition: HYPOTHESIS_rate — fraction of nodes with text grade [N?] or JSON confidence<0.5. Represents unverified assertions that must converge or be rejected. Distinct from MISS_rate which is un-graded (engineering debt).
3day_check_requires: 72h of samples at hourly cadence (71 additional --sample invocations after bootstrap) AND all drift_pct values < 1.0%. Load com.nexus.atlas-drift-monitor.plist to run automatically; until then verdict_3day_drift_under_threshold stays false even though all observed samples pass.
notes: atlas.n6 is read only via miss_to_exact_tracker.hexa — no writes performed.
Log file uses atomic append + fsync for crash safety.

Selected HYPOTHESIS rate (not MISS rate) as drift_pct because HYPOTHESIS represents semantic drift (claims requiring verification); MISS represents coverage gap (6.67%) and would fail a 1% threshold by design.
launchctl bootstrap is intentionally skipped per task instructions.
